description: Constraint tightness test. 3 requirements (2 lamps + 2 sensors + 2 plugs), budget 2500. Almost all premium and all-mid configurations are infeasible - the budget forces trade-offs. Expected Pareto front: (1) wifi mid mix Q=0.80 H=0 E=1; (2) zigbee mid + basic hub Q=0.83 H=1 E=1. Tests algorithm behavior when feasible region is small and most candidate configurations get rejected.
